Package reciprocal.linear.field

Class BigDecimalQuotientField

java.lang.Object
reciprocal.linear.field.BigDecimalQuotientField
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, QuotientField<BigDecimal,BigDecimal,BigDecimal>
@API(status=EXPERIMENTAL, since="0.0.1") public final class BigDecimalQuotientField extends Object implements QuotientField<BigDecimal,BigDecimal,BigDecimal>
Quotient field for BigDecimals
